ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Current year of study */,
  "academic_advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_academic_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_advisor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year in which the course is offered */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of prerequisite course IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score for the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assignment */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assignment in the final grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score the student received for the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Detailed feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "submission_file" TEXT /* File path or URL of the submitted assignment */,
  "late_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the exam belongs to */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score for the exam */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam the result belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the exam */,
  "score" REAL /* Score the student received for the exam */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the exam was taken */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Detailed feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Letter grade corresponding to the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., instructor, TA, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_student_data, edit_course_content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
